DQN_LN_RT.title: DQN_LN_RT
DQN_LN_RT.description: DQN with LayerNorm and Reward Trace.
DQN_LN_RT.mermaid_source:
graph TD
classDef default font-family:Inter,sans-serif,font-size:12px
classDef styleInput fill:#fbcfe8,stroke:#f472b6,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleNorm fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#facc15,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleMlp fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleRnn fill:#ffedd5,stroke:#fb923c,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleHead fill:#fae8ff,stroke:#e879f9,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleConcat fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#64748b,stroke-dasharray: 4 4,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
    Obs("Observation\n9×9×3"):::styleInput
    Scalars("A[4], R[1], RT[1], Hint[4]\n[10]"):::styleInput
    Conv("Conv2D 16×3×3\n9×9×3→9×9×16\n448 params"):::styleMlp
    ReLU1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Flat("Flatten\n→1296"):::styleMlp
    Concat("Concat\n→1306"):::styleConcat
    QHead("Q-Head\n64→4\n260 params"):::styleHead
    subgraph ForagerNet ["ForagerNet (Representation)"]
    direction TB
    Dense1("Dense\n1306→64\n83,392 params"):::styleMlp
    LN1("LayerNorm\n64\n32 params"):::styleNorm
    Act1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Dense2("Dense\n64→64\n4,160 params"):::styleMlp
    LN2("LayerNorm\n64\n128 params"):::styleNorm
    Act2("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Dense1 --> LN1
    LN1 --> Act1
    Act1 --> Dense2
    Dense2 --> LN2
    LN2 --> Act2
    end
    Obs --> Conv
    Conv --> ReLU1
    ReLU1 --> Flat
    Flat --> Concat
    Scalars --> Concat
    Concat --> Dense1
    Act2 --> QHead

    ReLU1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Flat("Flatten\n→1296"):::styleMlp
    Concat("Concat\n→1305"):::styleConcat
    QHead("Q-Head\n64→4\n260 params"):::styleHead

    Dense1("Dense\n1305→64\n83,328 params"):::styleMlp
    LN1("LayerNorm\n64\n32 params"):::styleNorm
    Act1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Dense2("Dense\n64→64\n4,160 params"):::styleMlp
    LN2("LayerNorm\n64\n128 params"):::styleNorm
    Act2("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Dense1 --> LN1
    LN1 --> Act1
    Act1 --> Dense2
    Dense2 --> LN2
    LN2 --> Act2

    Obs --> Conv

    ReLU1 --> Flat

DQN.title: DQN
DQN.mermaid_source:
graph TD
classDef default font-family:Inter,sans-serif,font-size:12px
classDef styleInput fill:#fbcfe8,stroke:#f472b6,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleNorm fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#facc15,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleMlp fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleRnn fill:#ffedd5,stroke:#fb923c,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif

classDef styleConcat fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#64748b,stroke-dasharray: 4 4,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
    Obs("Observation\n9×9×3"):::styleInput
    Scalars("A[4], R[1], Hint[4]\n[9]"):::styleInput
    Conv("Conv2D 16×3×3\n9×9×3→9×9×16\n448 params"):::styleMlp
    ReLU1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Flat("Flatten\n→1296"):::styleMlp
    Concat("Concat\n→1305"):::styleConcat
    QHead("Q-Head\n64→4\n260 params"):::styleHead
    subgraph ForagerNet ["ForagerNet (Representation)"]
    direction TB
    Dense1("Dense\n1305→64\n83,328 params"):::styleMlp
    Act1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Dense2("Dense\n64→64\n4,160 params"):::styleMlp
    Act2("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Dense1 --> Act1
    Act1 --> Dense2
    Dense2 --> Act2
    end
    Obs --> Conv
    Conv --> ReLU1
    ReLU1 --> Flat
    Flat --> Concat
    Scalars --> Concat
    Concat --> Dense1
    Act2 --> QHead

DRQN_LN_0_2.title: DRQN_LN_0_2
DRQN_LN_0_2.description: Recurrent DQN with LayerNorm, 0 pre-GRU layers.
DRQN_LN_0_2.mermaid_source:
graph TD
classDef default font-family:Inter,sans-serif,font-size:12px
classDef styleInput fill:#fbcfe8,stroke:#f472b6,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleNorm fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#facc15,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleMlp fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleRnn fill:#ffedd5,stroke:#fb923c,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleHead fill:#fae8ff,stroke:#e879f9,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleConcat fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#64748b,stroke-dasharray: 4 4,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
    QHead("Q-Head\n64→4\n5,464 params"):::styleHead
    subgraph ForagerNet ["DRQN (ForagerGRUNetReLU)"]
    direction TB
    Obs("Seq Obs\n9×9×3"):::styleInput
    Scalars("A[4], R[1], Hint[4]\n[9]"):::styleInput
    Conv("Conv2D 16×3×3\n9×9×3→9×9×16\n448 params"):::styleMlp
    ReLU1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Flat("Flatten\n→1296"):::styleMlp
    Concat("Concat\n→1305"):::styleConcat
    GRU("GRU 64\n1305→64\n262,336 params"):::styleRnn
    ReLU2("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Skip("Concat Skip\n→1369"):::styleConcat
        subgraph PostGRU ["Post-GRU"]
        direction TB
        PostDense1("Dense\n1369→64"):::styleMlp
        PostLN1("LayerNorm\n64"):::styleNorm
        PostAct1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
        PostDense2("Dense\n64→64"):::styleMlp
        PostLN2("LayerNorm\n64"):::styleNorm
        PostAct2("ReLU"):::styleNorm
        PostDense1 --> PostLN1
        PostLN1 --> PostAct1
        PostAct1 --> PostDense2
        PostDense2 --> PostLN2
        PostLN2 --> PostAct2
        end
    Obs --> Conv
    Conv --> ReLU1
    ReLU1 --> Flat
    Flat --> Concat
    Scalars --> Concat
    Concat --> GRU
    Concat --> Skip
    GRU --> ReLU2
    ReLU2 --> Skip
    end
    Skip --> PostDense1
    PostAct2 --> QHead

DRQN_LN_1_1.title: DRQN_LN_1_1
DRQN_LN_1_1.description: Recurrent DQN with LayerNorm, 1 pre-GRU layer.
DRQN_LN_1_1.mermaid_source:
graph TD
classDef default font-family:Inter,sans-serif,font-size:12px
classDef styleInput fill:#fbcfe8,stroke:#f472b6,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleNorm fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#facc15,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleMlp fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleRnn fill:#ffedd5,stroke:#fb923c,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleHead fill:#fae8ff,stroke:#e879f9,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleConcat fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#64748b,stroke-dasharray: 4 4,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
    QHead("Q-Head\n64→4\n516 params"):::styleHead
    subgraph ForagerNet ["DRQN (ForagerGRUNetReLU)"]
    direction TB
    Obs("Seq Obs\n9×9×3"):::styleInput
    Scalars("A[4], R[1], Hint[4]\n[9]"):::styleInput
    Conv("Conv2D 16×3×3\n9×9×3→9×9×16\n448 params"):::styleMlp
    ReLU1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Flat("Flatten\n→1296"):::styleMlp
    Concat("Concat\n→1305"):::styleConcat
    GRU("GRU 64\n64→64\n24,832 params"):::styleRnn
    ReLU2("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Skip("Concat Skip\n→128"):::styleConcat
        subgraph PreGRU ["Pre-GRU"]
        direction TB
        Pre("Dense\n1305→64\n83,328 params"):::styleMlp
        PreLN("LayerNorm\n64"):::styleNorm
        PreAct("ReLU"):::styleNorm
        Pre --> PreLN
        PreLN --> PreAct
        end
        subgraph PostGRU ["Post-GRU"]
        direction TB
        PostDense1("Dense\n128→64\n83,328 params"):::styleMlp
        PostLN1("LayerNorm\n64"):::styleNorm
        PostAct1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
        PostDense1 --> PostLN1
        PostLN1 --> PostAct1
        end
    Obs --> Conv
    Conv --> ReLU1
    ReLU1 --> Flat
    Flat --> Concat
    Scalars --> Concat
    GRU --> ReLU2
    ReLU2 --> Skip
    end
    Concat --> Pre
    PreAct --> GRU
    PreAct --> Skip
    Skip --> PostDense1
    PostAct1 --> QHead

    ReLU2("ReLU"):::styleNorm
    Skip("Concat Skip\n→1369"):::styleConcat
        subgraph PostGRU ["Post-GRU"]
        direction TB
        PostDense1("Dense\n1369→64"):::styleMlp
        PostAct1("ReLU"):::styleNorm
        PostDense2("Dense\n64→64"):::styleMlp

PPO_LN_RT_128.title: PPO_LN_RT_128
PPO_LN_RT_128.description: PPO with LayerNorm and Reward Trace.
PPO_LN_RT_128.mermaid_source:
graph TD
classDef default font-family:Inter,sans-serif,font-size:12px
classDef styleInput fill:#fbcfe8,stroke:#f472b6,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleNorm fill:#fef9c3,stroke:#facc15,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleMlp fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#38bdf8,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleRnn fill:#ffedd5,stroke:#fb923c,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleHead fill:#fae8ff,stroke:#e879f9,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
classDef styleConcat fill:#f8fafc,stroke:#64748b,stroke-dasharray: 4 4,color:#0f172a,font-family:Inter,sans-serif
    Obs("Observation\n9×9×3"):::styleInput
    Scalars("A[4], R[1], RT[1], Hint[4]\n[10]"):::styleInput
    Flat("Flatten\n→243"):::styleMlp
    subgraph Actor ["Actor"]
    direction TB
    A_Emb("Dense\n243→54\n13,176 params"):::styleMlp
    A_LN1("LayerNorm\n54\n108 params"):::styleNorm
    A_Act1("Tanh"):::styleNorm
    A_Concat("Concat\n→64"):::styleConcat
    A_Dense2("Dense\n64→192\n12,480 params"):::styleMlp
    A_Dense3("Dense\n192→64\n12,352 params"):::styleMlp
    A_LN2("LayerNorm\n64\n128 params"):::styleNorm
    A_Act3("Tanh"):::styleNorm
    A_Head("Logits\n64→4\n260 params"):::styleHead
    A_Emb --> A_LN1
    A_LN1 --> A_Act1
    A_Act1 --> A_Concat
    A_Concat --> A_Dense2
    A_Dense2 --> A_Dense3
    A_Dense3 --> A_LN2
    A_LN2 --> A_Act3
    A_Act3 --> A_Head
    end
    subgraph Critic ["Critic"]
    direction TB
    C_Emb("Dense\n243→54\n13,176 params"):::styleMlp
    C_LN1("LayerNorm\n54\n108 params"):::styleNorm
    C_Act1("Tanh"):::styleNorm
    C_Concat("Concat\n→64"):::styleConcat
    C_Dense2("Dense\n64→192\n12,480 params"):::styleMlp
    C_Dense3("Dense\n192→64\n12,352 params"):::styleMlp
    C_LN2("LayerNorm\n64\n128 params"):::styleNorm
    C_Act3("Tanh"):::styleNorm
    C_Head("Value\n64→1\n65 params"):::styleHead
    C_Emb --> C_LN1
    C_LN1 --> C_Act1
    C_Act1 --> C_Concat
    C_Concat --> C_Dense2
    C_Dense2 --> C_Dense3
    C_Dense3 --> C_LN2
    C_LN2 --> C_Act3
    C_Act3 --> C_Head
    end
    Obs --> Flat
    Flat --> A_Emb
    Flat --> C_Emb
    Scalars --> A_Concat
    Scalars --> C_Concat
    Actor ~~~ Critic

    A_Act1("Tanh"):::styleNorm
    A_Concat("Concat\n→64"):::styleConcat

    C_Dense2("Dense\n64→192\n12,480 params"):::styleMlp

    C_LN2("LayerNorm\n64\n128 params"):::styleNorm
    C_Act3("Tanh"):::styleNorm
    C_Head("Value\n64→1\n65 params"):::styleHead

    C_LN1 --> C_Act1
    C_Act1 --> C_Concat
    C_Concat --> C_Dense2
    C_Dense2 --> C_Dense3
    C_Dense3 --> C_LN2

    C_Act3 --> C_Head
    end
    Obs --> Flat
    Flat --> A_Emb
    Flat --> C_Emb
    Scalars --> A_Concat
    Scalars --> C_Concat
